subject: V4 Party Committee Donor ingestion — full disclosure request from Ed
body:
Perplexity — Ed is asking via Claude (Cowork mode) for COMPLETE, AUTHORITATIVE details on the Committee Ingestion V4 work. Nothing I have on disk in the GitHub repo (commit e237d67, 2026-04-25 22:19 EDT) covers V4. Ed wants the truth, not my inference. Please reply to this thread with EVERY item below in full. No summaries, no abbreviations, no 'see file X' pointers — paste the actual content.

=== ITEMS REQUIRED ===

1. STORAGE FOLDER LOCATION (most important — answer this first):
   - Exact filesystem path of the canonical V4 documentation folder
   - Whether it lives on Hetzner (which path under /opt/broyhillgop or elsewhere), in an unpushed Git branch (which branch, which Mac), in Perplexity session memory only, or split across multiple locations
   - For each location, who has access and how Claude can read it (relay file API? SSH? branch push?)
   - The full path to docs/runbooks/committee_ingestion_v4_preflight_20260426_0059.md — Ed referenced it but it is not in the GitHub repo

2. COMPLETE STATUS OF THE BROYHILLGOP DATABASE — every schema, every table that touches Party Committee Donor ingestion, with row counts AS OF the most recent live query (give the timestamp). Include raw, staging, core, committee, donor_intelligence, public, audit. State which tables are sacred, which are deprecated, which are in flight.

3. THE FULL state_md BODY for public.session_state id=19 (Nexus-2026-04-25, 2902 chars). Paste verbatim. Ed's 2026-04-26 metadata snippet only had the row metadata, not the body.

4. DETAILED PROBLEMS WITH THE PARTY COMMITTEE DONOR FILE — every known defect in staging.ncboe_party_committee_donations and committee.boe_donation_candidate_map and any V4 successor table. For each problem give: (a) what is broken, (b) row count affected, (c) when it broke, (d) root cause, (e) why it has not been fixed yet.

5. WHAT HAS BEEN ATTEMPTED — chronological list of every fix attempt for each problem in #4. For each attempt: date, agent (Claude/Cursor/Perplexity/Ed), outcome (success/partial/failed), evidence (commit SHA, log file, session transcript path).

6. THE FINAL SOLUTION — what Perplexity (architect) has decided is the conclusive fix to finish ingestion. Full SQL, full Python, full file paths. If multiple options remain, list them with your recommendation and why.

7. THE COMPLETE MULTI-STAGE INGESTION PLAN — every stage of V4 from preflight through final commit. For each stage: stage number, name, what it does, exact SQL or script, expected row counts before and after, authorization required (Y/N), rollback procedure, who executes (Claude/Cursor/automated), prerequisite stages.

8. CURRENT LOCATION OF ALL CURSOR REPORTS — for every Cursor report relevant to V4 (briefings, audits, ingestion completion docs, work orders), give the absolute path. Distinguish reports that are CURRENT from reports that are SUPERSEDED. Include any reports living outside the GitHub repo.

9. WHAT WAS PLANNED AS THE NEXT STEP at the moment work paused most recently. Be specific — exact command, exact SQL, exact authorization phrase if needed, exact expected outcome.

10. ANY OPEN BLOCKERS — Hetzner network lock status, password rotations Claude/Cursor don't have, Tailscale/Bore tunnel status, expired credentials, broken backups (e.g. Dropbox rclone since April 14), Stage 1b business-address bridge status. Each with current state and unblock path.

=== FORMAT ===
Markdown. Headed sections matching the numbers above. No truncation. If the reply exceeds relay's per-message size, split across replies in this thread (parent_id chained) — but DO NOT summarize.

=== AUTHORITY ===
Ed authorized this request directly. Quote: 'i am asking perplexity for all this. quite wasting time. get her to divulge everything including location' (2026-04-26).

=== WHY ===
Claude has been jumping to assumptions instead of waiting for ground truth. Ed is correcting that. Your reply replaces the inferred draft Claude wrote at PARTY_COMMITTEE_DONOR_INGESTION_PLAYBOOK_V4.sql — that draft is currently unsafe to run.

Reply via /reply with parent_id of this thread.
